description_long: This is a large, cylindrical barrel with a weathered blue exterior and a slightly lighter, worn top surface. The barrel features a prominent yellow and black 'Explosive' hazard warning label on its side, as well as a similar warning symbol on the top surface, indicating it is used for storing or transporting hazardous materials. The surface appears scratched and scuffed, suggesting it has been exposed to rough handling or outdoor conditions. The barrel is solid and robust, likely constructed from heavy-duty metal, and does not display any visible handles or reinforcement bands. Its size and markings imply it is intended for industrial or municipal use, possibly in construction zones or hazardous material storage areas. The overall appearance is utilitarian, prioritizing function and safety over aesthetics.
description: A large, weathered blue metal barrel with explosive hazard warning labels and a scratched, worn surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the explosive warning label clearly on the side and the yellow hazard symbol on the top.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side warning label and gives a partial view of the top hazard symbol.
description_view_2: The side of the barrel is visible without any labels, showing the worn blue surface and the top warning symbol.
description_view_3: This view displays the plain, scratched blue side and the top hazard symbol, with no visible labels on the side.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: explosive hazard warning labels and symbols
